## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Homebase and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, quality improvements, and reporting.](https://fathom.video/share/7QEUaxjYxwnn8dbqmSu8mvJfYj-kz54q?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Matt Alves-Hill introduced as new managing editor, bringing expertise from GrowthX's strategy sprint team](https://fathom.video/share/7QEUaxjYxwnn8dbqmSu8mvJfYj-kz54q?tab=summary&timestamp=129.0)
  - [Focus on improving input quality for Atlas to enhance output, particularly for TLDR and "How to Start a Business" content](https://fathom.video/share/7QEUaxjYxwnn8dbqmSu8mvJfYj-kz54q?tab=summary&timestamp=277.0)
  - [New agentic pipelines in Atlas to be implemented, offering more control over research process](https://fathom.video/share/7QEUaxjYxwnn8dbqmSu8mvJfYj-kz54q?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
  - [Need to review and potentially refresh glossary content, improve reporting, and refine workflows](https://fathom.video/share/7QEUaxjYxwnn8dbqmSu8mvJfYj-kz54q?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)

## Topics

### Team Updates and Introductions

  - [Matthew Alves-Hill introduced as new managing editor from GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/7QEUaxjYxwnn8dbqmSu8mvJfYj-kz54q?tab=summary&timestamp=199.0)
  - [Brings experience from GrowthX's strategy sprint team and onboarding processes](https://fathom.video/share/7QEUaxjYxwnn8dbqmSu8mvJfYj-kz54q?tab=summary&timestamp=217.0)
  - [Carrie on vacation until Monday, Mark absent due to urgent project](https://fathom.video/share/7QEUaxjYxwnn8dbqmSu8mvJfYj-kz54q?tab=summary&timestamp=107.0)

### Content Quality and Improvement Strategies

  - [Glossary content performing well, but needs quality check for recent articles](https://fathom.video/share/7QEUaxjYxwnn8dbqmSu8mvJfYj-kz54q?tab=summary&timestamp=328.0)
  - [TLDR content facing issues with misalignment to main article content](https://fathom.video/share/7QEUaxjYxwnn8dbqmSu8mvJfYj-kz54q?tab=summary&timestamp=879.0)
  - [New agentic pipelines in Atlas to be implemented for Homebase](https://fathom.video/share/7QEUaxjYxwnn8dbqmSu8mvJfYj-kz54q?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
      - [Allows more control over research process](https://fathom.video/share/7QEUaxjYxwnn8dbqmSu8mvJfYj-kz54q?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
      - [Should improve targeting and efficiency in content generation](https://fathom.video/share/7QEUaxjYxwnn8dbqmSu8mvJfYj-kz54q?tab=summary&timestamp=524.0)
  - [Focus on editorial intervention to enhance depth and quality of content](https://fathom.video/share/7QEUaxjYxwnn8dbqmSu8mvJfYj-kz54q?tab=summary&timestamp=548.0)
  - [Plan to review and potentially update artifacts to improve output quality](https://fathom.video/share/7QEUaxjYxwnn8dbqmSu8mvJfYj-kz54q?tab=summary&timestamp=602.0)

### Reporting and Analytics

  - [Looker dashboard introduced but needs refinement](https://fathom.video/share/7QEUaxjYxwnn8dbqmSu8mvJfYj-kz54q?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)
      - [Currently shows clicks, impressions, non-branded traffic](https://fathom.video/share/7QEUaxjYxwnn8dbqmSu8mvJfYj-kz54q?tab=summary&timestamp=1276.0)
      - [Cohort analysis available by content clusters](https://fathom.video/share/7QEUaxjYxwnn8dbqmSu8mvJfYj-kz54q?tab=summary&timestamp=1355.0)
  - [Improvements needed:](https://fathom.video/share/7QEUaxjYxwnn8dbqmSu8mvJfYj-kz54q?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)
      - [Segmentation for glossary vs. other content types](https://fathom.video/share/7QEUaxjYxwnn8dbqmSu8mvJfYj-kz54q?tab=summary&timestamp=1235.0)
      - [Individual URL performance tracking](https://fathom.video/share/7QEUaxjYxwnn8dbqmSu8mvJfYj-kz54q?tab=summary&timestamp=1381.0)
      - [Keyword position movements](https://fathom.video/share/7QEUaxjYxwnn8dbqmSu8mvJfYj-kz54q?tab=summary&timestamp=1481.0)
      - [Internal linking analysis](https://fathom.video/share/7QEUaxjYxwnn8dbqmSu8mvJfYj-kz54q?tab=summary&timestamp=1534.0)
  - [Discussion on expanding metrics beyond impressions and clicks](https://fathom.video/share/7QEUaxjYxwnn8dbqmSu8mvJfYj-kz54q?tab=summary&timestamp=1410.0)
      - [Consider keyword volume, page 1 rankings, position improvements](https://fathom.video/share/7QEUaxjYxwnn8dbqmSu8mvJfYj-kz54q?tab=summary&timestamp=1440.0)

### Content Refresh Strategy

  - [No systematic content refresh currently in place for Homebase](https://fathom.video/share/7QEUaxjYxwnn8dbqmSu8mvJfYj-kz54q?tab=summary&timestamp=803.0)
  - [Glossary content approaching 6-12 month threshold for potential refresh](https://fathom.video/share/7QEUaxjYxwnn8dbqmSu8mvJfYj-kz54q?tab=summary&timestamp=1118.0)
  - [Need to establish triggers and reports for identifying refresh opportunities](https://fathom.video/share/7QEUaxjYxwnn8dbqmSu8mvJfYj-kz54q?tab=summary&timestamp=1534.0)
  - [Plan to support refreshing older content once workflows and quality are improved](https://fathom.video/share/7QEUaxjYxwnn8dbqmSu8mvJfYj-kz54q?tab=summary&timestamp=1560.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Matt to review and update input artifacts for Atlas to improve content quality](https://fathom.video/share/7QEUaxjYxwnn8dbqmSu8mvJfYj-kz54q?tab=summary&timestamp=1020.0)
  - [Implement new agentic pipelines in Atlas for Homebase](https://fathom.video/share/7QEUaxjYxwnn8dbqmSu8mvJfYj-kz54q?tab=summary&timestamp=499.0)
  - [Update Looker dashboard with additional functionality (e.g., segmentation, URL performance)](https://fathom.video/share/7QEUaxjYxwnn8dbqmSu8mvJfYj-kz54q?tab=summary&timestamp=1246.0)
  - [Create Linear ticket for data team to improve reporting capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/7QEUaxjYxwnn8dbqmSu8mvJfYj-kz54q?tab=summary&timestamp=1500.0)
  - [Schedule walkthrough of Atlas changes and improvements](https://fathom.video/share/7QEUaxjYxwnn8dbqmSu8mvJfYj-kz54q?tab=summary&timestamp=1608.0)
  - [Matt to reach out to Sonia or Mark for specific queries as needed](https://fathom.video/share/7QEUaxjYxwnn8dbqmSu8mvJfYj-kz54q?tab=summary&timestamp=1633.0)
